brand.name: VectorKit
brand.audience: Engineering teams building reliable agent workflows
constraints: must work in black and white

summary: A sample Logo Lab gallery for VectorKit, an AI developer platform that needs a precise, modular, high-contrast identity system.

directions.name: Signal Systems
directions.description: Linear and striped marks that suggest reliable signal, routing, and agent coordination.

directions.name: Precise Geometry
directions.description: Radial and interlocking systems with a technical, engineered character.

directions.name: Platform Grid
directions.description: Modular grid marks that feel extensible, systematic, and product-native.

directions.name: Bold Containers
directions.description: Contained abstract marks with high recognition and strong app-icon potential.

directions.name: Letter Marks
directions.description: Initial-driven marks using the leading V as a compact product signature.

concepts.rationale: Line Warp creates a controlled signal motif that fits reliable agent infrastructure without falling into generic AI symbols.
concepts.bestFor: agent orchestration, routing, and observability surfaces
concepts.recommendationReason: Line Warp keeps the top set balanced across tools while adding a strong signal systems option for VectorKit.
